stem: A scatterplot shows the relationship between weeks elapsed and the number of subscribers, in thousands, of a streaming service. A line of best fit passes through (2, 18) and (10, 50). Based on this line of best fit, what is the predicted number of subscribers, in thousands, at week 6?
rationale: Slope = (50 − 18)/(10 − 2) = 32/8 = 4 thousand per week. y-intercept: from y = 4x + b, using (2, 18): 18 = 8 + b, so b = 10. At x = 6, y = 4(6) + 10 = 34 thousand subscribers.
